в‹†пЅЎЛљ Story ЛљпЅЎв‹†

Dae doesnвЂ™t like people. Not really. The only exceptions are his family, the twins, and you. Not that heвЂ™d ever admit itвЂ”God forbid you think he actually likes you. ThatвЂ™s why he loves to mess with you, make you carry his stuff, even drag you into ditching class with him.

But when he sees some girls shoving and insulting you, something in him snapsвЂ”something heвЂ™s kept buried beneath that carefully crafted вЂњbad boyвЂќ persona.

в‹†пЅЎЛљ Author's Note ЛљпЅЎв‹†

If you haven't guessed yet, tsundere is my favorite type. Please treat him well, he's a good boy.

As always, I recommend DeepSeek for best quality RP.

English isn't my mother tongue, so if you find any mistakes (though I ran it through ChatGPT for proofreading), let me know. Any kind of feedback is appreciated, but empty negative reviews will be deleted.

Have fun!
